review_text: We love popping up for short stays and you can’t beat the location … we didn’t have much choice as we booked last minute and took a 3 brm villa. The cabins are lovely, glimpse of the water, well laid out with an extra loo for convenience. Bedrooms are really comfortable with a king & queen and bunks. Only a quick walk to the beach would book this again in a heartbeat.
We stayed here in our caravan, roomy site. Ammenities clean & tidy. Beach a short walk, nice cafe on site with good coffee. Friendly staff.

We visited Agnes Water for 4 nights and had the best caravan site with an amazing ocean view. The staff were very friendly and welcoming, and the little cove nearby was perfect for surfers of all ages. Shops were close by and 1770 was only a short drive away. Such a relaxing and beautiful spot we’ll definitely be back!
We loved the view from our villa. Very well appointed and clean. Everything worked beautifully for us.

Perfekte Lage direkt am Strand. Auf der schattigen Fläche zwischen Strand und Campingplatz lässt es sich gut spielen, Lesen, verweilen. Spitzen Café direkt auf dem Platz. Zugang zum discoverytrail und einem kleinen lookout-walk. Direkt nebenan ist ein Spielplatz. Kurze Wege ins Städtchen. Wir haben es geliebt. Reichlich duschen und Toiletten, hier fehlt es leider an Haken/Ablagemöglichkeiten, einer Bank in der Dusche und einem Spiegel.
Die Gemeinschaftsküche ist in Ordnung, leider nur zwei Kochplatten.
Great spot for family to have a great time with kids enjoying the beach and some surfing.
Great kid & dog friendly park.  The beach is right at your doorstep.

We have been to this park several times over the years. The staff are friendly and very accommodating.
We had rebooked to return 6 weeks later from our previous visit. Our site was well positioned.
Great location on the beach, lovely parkland with an excellent on site cafe.
It will be a regular go to, 3 hours from home.
Not only is this the most beautiful beach and camping ground , but is run by two absolute legends, Bec and Glen.  Both deserve a raise !!! Or a house😉.
Great location: lovely staff, 1 minute walk to the beach, good facilities, highly recommend.
Love this place, beautiful views of the ocean from our sites, on site Cafe make great coffee and food.. we've been here a few times and love the place. Great for surfing and swimming!

The most beautiful location you could ask for. We love the NRMA Agnes Water Holiday Park. We love the short walk to the beach, the cute cafe, the friendly staff and the whole vibe. Perfect for families and a slice of heaven.
Amazing location directly on beach and a 5 minute walk to supermarket and shops. Park was safe and peaceful. Friendly staff

Great holiday park with beautiful location. Park and amenities nice and clean.
Will definitely visit again.
Great holiday at a great place and thank you to all staff. Clean, great location and thank you for a lovely stay . We will be back
The best break on the beach I’ve ever had, couldn’t believe how beautiful it was.
Everything was great but Mal at reception was what made the stay standout. He was so helpful.
An amazing stay as last experienced, cleanliness and tidiness was impeccable, staff were smiling which was noticeably contagious onto visitors, we will be back again no doubt.
Lovely beachfront caravan park in a great little town. The cabins are  modern and very comfotable. Friendly and helpful staff. Loved our stay here.
Great van park with lots of options for the type of accommodation you may need

Very friendly staff and with the discount a very good price for the Beachfront Studio. The studio was well equiped with full size fridge and spotlessly clean. Great position on the beach. The only downside, studio 9A is situated next to the Holiday Cafe, very close, and so is noisy from 7am, no sleep in, and can be busy until 2pm.
Great location, surf and coffee what else is needed in life!!

What a beautiful place to relax and enjoy. I would highly recommended booking a stay. It’s spotless clean and very welcoming everyone is friendly and the beach is yours to enjoy. Step into a new tranquility world and enjoy your holiday. It’s that easy 🤩
Perfect location on the beach, good prices, tent/cabins are very comfortable and clean, staff are cool, customer service was 10/10. Very much recommend staying here

The beachfront cabins are definitely prime location, we love them so much, repeat customers every year! While the park facilities are limited, no playground or pool, the beach is so close & the relaxation vibes are amazing!

We stayed in a studio villa. The location was perfect. There was nothing but a small patch of lawn between our balcony and the beach. The views were stunning. It was so nice to sit on the deck and enjoy the views and the tranquility. Having an on-site cafe was an added bonus. There were not heaps of people so the  beach was nice and quiet.

If you stay in MH, ask to look at site first, some sites do not have great water power or run off water egress access easy distance. Reception helpful with a hose and connector however first time my hose did not reach .
If booking through 3rd party site make sure you phone ahead if have an special requests e.g. disability toilet access.

We always stay in our caravan and absolutely love to stay at the First Point.   We love how close it is to the beach.  The Manager and the staff where absolutely 'on point'.  We would highly recommend this park.
Great place at the suites relaxing and right on the beach.
Perfect location on the surf beach, amenities very clean, friendly and helpful staff, walking distance to cafes, shops.  Had a wonderful stay with family and friends

We loved our stay in the cabins right on the Waterfront!  Amazing location? The staff were all friendly and welcoming.  We felt at home as soon as we walked in.
Thank you team we will definitely be back.
Fantastic park! Staff are all super friendly and helpful , park is clean and tidy . Access to the surf beach is easy. Dogs are welcome

Great location and one of the best parks around! Very clean , all staff very friendly and the new management a delight to deal with, nothing was too much trouble for them to handle.
If you haven't stayed here its you loss , its a must and you can take your fur babies.
Until next time , thanks for a great stay.

I regret to give this lovely park such a low review.
However, as a group party booking with several family member groups, we were all separate from one and other with the exception of two family groups (who did not know each other at the time of arrival). This was not how it was booked originally and how the booking got changed no one knows.
Our caravan site was to be near the camp kitchen.  It was my 60th birthday and was to be my last family birthday party so we wanted everyone to be together close as possible. With the exception on one family group, we were all to be accommodated in the front cabins.
Such a mix up with everyone scattered around. Many family members were elderly and not up to all the walking up and down from the back area they were not supposed to be in.
So extremely disappointed with this arrangement.
It was a nostalgic visit as seven years ago we had the same family reunion (just for the heck of it) and both my dad and his brother were still with us back then.
The lady on reception who booked me (caravan) and elderly mum (cabin up the back as it turned out) was rude and largely unhelpful with small details given only on the park paper. After seven long hours driving this was really not helpful.
She rolled her eyes at me to say I should have looked at my emails for information on booking in.
As I was driving separately from my husband I was not concentrating on emails. I mistakenly thought I was to be sent a text message.
Very unhappy camper.
We loved our Beachfront Villa. It had a lovely view of the beach from the balcony. The Villa was very comfortable and clean. We enjoyed the stay very much.
Sehr gepflegter und sauberer Campingplatz....absolut top👍
Great park close to beach and shops. Cafe in the park was ok

This park has direct beach access, a large shady grass park between the cabins and beach which is nice, good amenities & kitchen, a cafe, clean & well maintained with friendly & helpful staff. It is close to everything in town. We really enjoyed our stay & will be back regularly.

We stayed a couple of nights at NRMA Agnes Water Holiday Park in our caravan and had a great experience. The park was clean, tidy, and very well maintained. The staff were friendly and always helpful, which made our stay even better.

The amenities were cleaned daily and were spotless. The park is perfectly located just metres from the main beach, making it easy to come and go. There’s a good café on site, and it’s also within easy walking distance to other cafés and restaurants. The supermarket is only a five-minute drive away, which is very convenient.

Bonus points for being dog-friendly. We’d happily stay here again and would recommend it to anyone visiting Agnes Water.

Great camping ground. Right on the beach, grassed sites, concrete slabs, level, enough room. Manager provided longer lead to access power. Amenities set up good, cleanliness ok, on the beach so lots of sand tho showers are provided outside. Would stay again.

Such a wonderful beach and vibe. The campground is directly on the beach. The amenities are good . Kitchen, good showers. You can walk to restaurants and ice cream. The walk on the beach was the best. Should have stayed longer
Affordable, friendly staff, beautifully kept grounds, o site cafe, easy access to beautiful beach, dog friendly… such a great time in a beautiful location.

Had an amazing stay at nrma Agnes water we were so close to the beach. All staff were so unbelievably lovely, a special thanks to Greg for assisting us setting up our tent and giving us camping tips as we are camping newbies. Had a lovely time 🫶🏼🫶🏼
Love this place. Staff. Location. Cleanliness.

We stayed in beach front 2 bedroom Villa. It was very comfortable with great access to the beach. The staff was very friendly and kind. I broke something in the kitchen and told them about it and they were very forgiving.

The location at Agnes is great but the powered site we were allocated was terrible. The site was oddly close to toilets. After being told we couldn't change sites as they were booked out (fair enough), I asked for credit for the other 2 nights. Credit was refused. As 2 females travelling alone, we didn't fancy sleeping 4-5 metres away from the men's toilet doorway for 3 nights, so we cut our losses and left without staying. At the least, a wall or garden separating the site from toilets is needed. Hardly a relaxing camping trip near the beach! The only water you'd be hearing is toilets flushing! We now know to call and ask about site locations in the future - don't book online!
This park is absolutely amazing, right on the beach, walking distance to shops.  Very clean park and managers are very friendly.  Went out of their way to help us.
Beach front cabins are in a great location.  They need some upgrading though.  Very basic utilities and finishes.

In the middle of my 12th year coming back to this fantastic location. It’s a pleasure to meet and chat to the NEW Management. Welcoming, friendly and considerate. They really know how to run a beautiful clean and organised park with the understanding that families are here to have an enjoyable holiday. A stones throw to one of Qlds most beautiful swimming beaches, and one of the best learn to surf breaks you can find. I’d love to keep it a secret, but it’s too good not to share.

Amazing location, very friendly staff. We really enjoyed our experience, my only recommendation is that they do something to improve access to the Women’s facilities. My key would often not work and I would spend a long time giggling it backwards/forwards, pulling it out, putting it back in. I heard others have the same experience. Maybe a new lock/key system or code instead?
Other than that, very good!
Thanks 😊
We absolutely loved our stay.  Agnes water is an amazing location and the nrma caravan park is a perfect place to experience it.
Very clean, nice position. Will be back thank you

Another fantantic stay at one of our favourite parks in Australia. Staff are always friendly and helpful, the park is well maintained and the onsite cafe is a real bonus. The icing on the cake is the location with the beach seconds from your caravan. Looking forward to our next visit which is already booked.
Such a beautiful part of the world and this park is right on the beach. Park up and no need to get in your car again - walk to everything and spend all day on the beach!
Beautiful location which is worth 5 Stars by itself. Encouragement for the new managers, hopefully you enjoy your time there and you bring back that wonderful holiday spirit.
Easy access to beach. Awesome for caravans. If everyone parks in a line it leave a great spot out the back of your van to look at the beach. Amenities were clean. Definitely would come back.

5 Stars all round, staff were amazing to deal with from the booking process, arrival and check out, The room was exceptionally clean and well maintained. The location is within walking distance to everything. Thanks Team, see you next time.
Emplacement génial au bord de la plage

We had an enjoyable stay in our caravan. The park is in a perfect location and has a large lawn area leading onto the beach with plenty of trees for shade. Amenities were clean and well maintained. Highly recommend for a stay. Family and pet friendly.
Our unpowered lot was pretty unpleasant right against a shed but other than that the amenities were great and the location even better
Heerlijke locatie gelijk aan het strand. Het sanitair is erg schoon en up to date. Personeel bij de receptie zijn heel erg vriendelijk en meedenkend. 😀

We have been coming to this Park since 1977. Same view, excellent location, Great staff. Thanks to Mal, Annie and Connie for making our stay stress free.
Café is great and coffee perfect.
Probably 2 things of concern were number of kids riding bikes etc. without helmets especially after Reception was closed.
And, an increase in barking dogs at all hours of the night but probably expected as most sites had a dog.
Absolute dream of a location! The Villas are spacious and well furnished. That view from the cabin makes it all worth it!
Caravan park on the water edge, enjoy the swim. Short walk to shops to replenish supplies. The park has a number of glam tents on beach front. Ameneties were clean and we enjoyed the stay.
Having the cafe on-site so close to the beach front was a real bonus and convenient. Lovely meals an a great service
The only complaint I have was the check in if there is a caravan checking in the one waiting to check in has to wait on the road, stopping all traffic on the road.

Propre une dalle pour mettre table et  chaises et un espace avec du gravier pour camping car
Sanitaires tres  propres

Really nice Caravan park, easy access to the beach from within the Caravan park. Quick walk to nearby shops and restaurants, as well as a Playground next door to the park. There is a small cafe in the park as well for Breakfast & lunch. Sites were a good size and easy to connect to power/water/sullage.

A lovely park, great location right on the beach & close to cafes, takeaways & Foodworks.  We stayed on a powered site in a new modern area at the back of the park.  Very close to modern clean amenities & camp kitchen.  Very well laid out.  Need to come back for longer.
Top spot to relax.

Fantastic park
Friendly team
Clean & tidy

This NRMA park is exceptional and would visit again.  Stayed in a on beach cabin and perfect to wake up each morning and hear the ocean and look over the beautifully landscaped area heading down to the beach.  Cafe right next door which provided great service and coffee.  Will definitely visit for longer next time.

Great location on the beach. Amenities are super clean. It’s quiet and friendly and safe. An awesome park. Book ahead because it’s super popular. Thank you for a fabulous camping experience at NRMA Agnes Water Holiday Park.
Best caravan park cleaned  friendly staff coffee shop is really good beach close all the best see you soon again
Great little caravan park. Awesome location. Cafe is terrific.
Perfect location and a great team. An added bonus is the perfect coffee overlooking the beach.
The location is the highest identity of the place. Peaceful, clean and good attention. Highly recommend. Agnes water always ir a lovely place to go!

Bei uns hat etwas mit dem Online Checkin nicht geklappt, weshalb wir zur Reception gingen. Die Dame dort war sehr unfreundlich und hat uns mit Murren die Map inkl. Stellplatznummer gegeben (-1 Stern).
Wir hatten einen Stellplatz bei der Rundstrasse, gerade neben der Küche. Leider war es relativ laut dort und man war ein wenig ausgestellt. Das Bad war sauber, aber es hat zu wenig WCs/Duschen ubd es ist sehr warm/feucht dort (-1 Stern).
Die Lage, der beaufsichtigte Strand sowie das Cafe sind genial! Super für einen Abstecher nach 1770 oder einfach zum baden / sonnen.

Location location location, every need within walking distance, family friendly beach right at door step, great staff and fabulous cafe on site. Easy checkin and out. Grounds well maintained. We stayed in a villa this trip and perfect for our 3 night stay, everything we needed. Super comfy beds. Great view from our veranda. Highly recommend Agnes Water Caravan Park if you are headed to Agnes Waters.
Great place to stay

Park is directly on the beach. Has cafe open til around 2pm serving breakfast, brunch, lunch. Facilities are great, but now school holidays have started, they tend to get a bit grubby. This is one of our favourite spots along this part of the Queensland coast. Easy walk to shops and tavern. Sites are reasonably sized. Quiet at night.

Had a 5 night stay here. The park is in two parts the older park close to the beach and the newer Spring Road part. We stayed in the Spring Road part right by the entrance site 101. This part of the park is for smaller single axel vans, roof top tents, and motor homes, our van is 8m total. Parking was a little tight, not much room between vans and getting in with the van could be a challenge. We were 380m from the beach but I felt our part of the camp was quiet. Other than the Saturday when we arrived and lots of kids  they packed up Sunday and left we didn't see anymore for the rest of the stay which was good as so much more peaceful and relaxing without them. Not the case in the older side. I don't think there are enough amenities 3 toilets and 2 showers we we were with 2 ambulatory shower toilet combined. There only 1 washing machine dryer in the SP part of the camp.
Amazing beautiful beach

An absolutely beautiful location - and that’s what you’re paying for. Unfortunately the parks facilities are really old and not family friendly at all. We were there in our campervan with a baby and two toddlers so needed the facilities, and they were strictly male/female with no family room or unisex/disabled bathrooms. We were reported for using the male facilities to shower our three kids quickly after an afternoon at the beach - obviously by someone who has never had young kids and doesn’t understand the difficulties. Really tainted our experience here and we won’t be back.
A great location and park to stay in
Damn Daniel! Wow! So glad I booked this place. Our room had the bessssstt view. If you want ocean views stay here. Please, you'll have no ragrets,  not even one letter😉😂

Good location with private beach access.

but found where we were staying had multiple visible moulds on the side area right next to the bedside dust and weird set-up of TV direction and bathroom (taps position) to the actual room.

Sliding door dividing was broken so could not be closed.

There is no way to block out the noise from the next cabin/tent since it was so close together.
Great spot!
First time at Agnes waters it is a great place to stay and would go back again in the future
Great location, clean facilities, awesome cafe. Great spot for an extended family vacation where everyone stayed in different accomodations - powered sites, villa, and safari tent etc
Très facile à trouver, sanitaires au top

Agnes Waters
“Surf Mist” (Poll positioned, August 2025)

At $388 per night (we paid for the view).
Amenities ’tired’  - 2 only tiny bars of soap. Just 2 sachets of dish washing detergent + 2 only thin miserable small bin liners. Nothing serviced.  Next door neighbours on same level had no view at all. Totally obscured by Aust Cabbage Tree Palms. A microwave would have been nice. I haven’t mentioned the condition of the front of the outdoor ’fridge. An energetic bush rat resident amongst our dish / cutlery drawers (evidence pictured). It scurried off as we opened the drawer. Split system aircon slowly disfiguring top RHS of wall mounted TV.  Outside roof struts seriously corroded. Security back door lock unworkable. You’re paying for the great view and beach proximity and that’s it. It’s clearly run on an oil rag. Front end 5 star. Back end 1 star !! Otherwise a pleasant enough stay. But value for money? No.
Great rooms,  reasonable cost

The cabin has nice view, beach. All rooms are claen and comfortable. Every bedroom has TV. The wifi is good. The amenities and kitchen toos are complete. Nice staff.
The food from the cafe are nice.

Extremely disappointing experience due to unacceptable management conduct.

We’ve holidayed in Agnes for years and booked this trip 12 months in advance for a relaxing family getaway. Within just two hours of arriving and setting up, we were met with unnecessary aggression from the current manager over the position of our parked car. Despite apologising and moving the vehicle within a timely manner to an alternate spot, the tone was confrontational rather than courteous. Throughout our stay, our families were subjected to repeated hostility, false accusations of vandalism to park property, and an overall aggressive approach from management. What should have been a relaxing break felt more like being monitored in a detention centre.

Reviews indicate this was not an isolated incident with management behaviour and definitely not a welcoming environment for families. Until there is a change in management, I strongly recommend staying elsewhere in Agnes.

NRMA, I urge you to take this seriously—we have submitted a formal complaint for investigation.
Great people running the park. Very helpful. Great location.

Great park with a lovely little cafe / restaurant. Food was delicious. There’s also a great bar in walking distance where you can get some good food and drinks. The beach was stunning. Would highly recommend.

New management show no willingness to help or listen. Asked about possibility of any sites being available in the old area during our stay as we are up in the newer area and received a blunt response of no sites until October. Last management would at least have a look for you as happened last year and we had a week there.

We stayed in Cabin 6A for two nights. The cabin has views of the beach and ocean. The views are absolutely beautiful.
The cabin was very clean, neat and tidy with a comfortable bed and a full size fridge. The cabin and views exceeded our expectations.
We had breakfast at the cafe at the caravan park and it was great and the cafe also had beautiful views of the ocean. The prices were reasonable as well which is hard to find anywhere these days.

Great place to visit.
Park the car , throw away the keys as everything is within walking distance.

Great location and atmosphere with kids and dogs everywhere. Facilities ok and staff ok with minimal input. Shame we could get bikes to work, even as NRMA membership, but reception didn’t want to know about it. Went up town and fabulous service from shop in photo, with lights and locks etc to bike the 8km to 1770 for sunset. The beach with cafe at Agnes is awesome

Absolutely beautiful, love this location, staff great. Nice coffee shop for breakfast, lunch or coffee and cake.
Lovely lovely lovely.
Wished we’d stayed for a lot longer.

Great park and location
We would definitely return here

Zum Glück hatten wir Agnes Water jn unseren Reiseplan aufgenommen. Der Campingplatz liegt wirklich toll am Strand und nah zum Ortszentrum. Lohnenswert auch der kurze Ausflug zum 1770 Lookout, den wir mit Fahrrädern absolvierten. Die Bar kurz davor ist ein perfekter Sundowner Platz. Alles sehr entspannt!
Mooie camping met fantastische ligging maar de  meest chagrijnige vrouw die ik tot nu toe tegen ben gekomen bij receptie van de camping.

Super gepflegte und saubere Anlage, ausnahmslos. Man ist sehr schnell am Strand. Mal kommt ein Tomatenverkäufer vorbei, mal gibt es Pizza, das fand ich sehr nett. Der Pool sieht sehr sauber aus. Habe mich hier rundum wohl gefühlt
Great park right on the beach. Excellent cafe - great coffee!

This is a fabulous location. The room was  very nice with comfortable bed and lounge. Kitchenettes was very tight but adequate for our needs. The only thing that spoiled our visit was the woman on the desk when we arrived was very rude and obviously having a bad day. All I can say is she either needs to leave or change her attitude.

We have stayed many times under the old management and loved the place. When we booked we selected a site that would allow us to use the kids swags and give us plenty of room.
When we set up, we were told that new management did not allow swags in grass as they were trying to improve the grass. We saw them make other customers pitch their tent on the concrete slabs.
I've never heard of a campsite where you can not pitch a tent or a swag on  grass.
When we checked out, we again raised the issue and were told no swags as it was new fire regulations.  At least get your story straight.

We just stayed four nights in oceanview cabin #4. The views are unbeatable and the trees full of beautiful birds. Our cabin was clean and up to date, however, could use a few tweaks. There was a cupboard door missing in the kitchen, the fridge was missing the shelf in the door where you put tall bottles and the washing machine had a sign saying 'Sorry I'm broken'. This wasn't mentioned at check in and appeared to have been broken for a while. The cafe in the grounds was excellent. The coffee, food and service couldn't be faulted. Check in was quite strange. Another elderly couple arrived just as we did at 1:40pm. We were all told that the cleaners were still in our rooms, despite the person on the desk not having asked any of our names or what room types we'd booked. We were all told to return at 2pm. I found this archaic and unnecessarily pedantic. It gave a bad feeling about management from the start. Unfortunate, given what a great park it is overall. We would come back.

Could not be more impressed with our stay. This was just a quick stop for us overnight and we wish we could stay longer! The beach front studio had everything we needed for our stay. The studio felt modern, very clean & the bed was so comfortable. You can hear the waves and see the water from the front porch. We enjoyed a delicious coffee in the morning from the cafe next to our studio. The staff were very friendly & the service was fantastic. We cannot wait to book here again. Thankyou NRMA for such a wonderful stay!
Lovely caravan park in one of the best spots in Oz.
Unfriendly stuff. We wanted to borrow a screwdriver but he thought we could steal it. We stayed in front of the campsite and had a problem with our car.
the best campsite we’ve stayed in yet. lovely patient staff. gorgeous beach. clean. flat. bright and airy. loved it. wish we could have stayed longer. Will one day come back!

My partner and I are camping for 2 nights at NRMA Agnes Waters Holiday Park nice park to visit very clean, nice friendly service its right on the beach ⛱️
I recommend and will stay here again.

What a amazing park run by a amazing team. To be able to handle the amount of guests coming in and out of the park and keep the property well maintained and deal with all the different personalities that you see in a large caravan park environment is a credit to the management team and all of the staff. The position of the park speaks for itself and the value for money is well above avg. At $70 a night for a powered site in such a amazing place this is as good as it gets.

The place is comfortable and well prepared, nice location, but the service was not what we expected. We notified them that we were going to be late to check in and they were supposed to send us an email with the instructions to enter that never arrived. We were able to get in anyway and the next day when we wanted to extend one more night, the staff was not friendly at all. It left us with a bitter taste in our experience at Agnes Water.
We traveled all the way from South Africa to camp here. It was absolutely amazing,clean and cheerful.
Nice level powered site close to the beach and amenities. Quick check in as I booked online. Grounds well maintained.

We stayed here one night only one night we got a powered site mind you costed us 70 bloody dollars the beach is unswimmable as there were plenty of blue bottles washed up on the beach, they also mention year round swimming with stinger nets however they do not have nets nor do they have a pool or any other alternative besides a shower to cool off we also sat outside for about 10 minutes until they opened the gate for us to check in. compared to other NRMA’s I would suggest giving this one a miss as you can see what agnus waters and 1770 have to offer in a day trip would not recommend

Karren Manager. No people skills. She had a total blowup over bugger all. Calls cops who are now her personal hurt feelings police. They are bewildered as to why they are there and then leave.  Best drama ever would rival Summer Bay, Get ya hubby to work on his Alf Stewart impersonation.  Kids had a great time cant wait to see you lot again ❤️.  P.s. You might want to put more signage up about helmets required on bikes and scooters in the park. Probly along the paths and traffic areas where 30+ kids rode around with no helmets for days before you have another episode.

My family has been staying at Agnes for several years, ever since the second area at the back opened. We have always absolutely adored the park, its amenities, the location, and the overall vibe.

Unfortunately, I feel compelled to write this one-star review following our most recent visit. The current management duo running the park are absolutely horrid. From the moment we arrived until the moment we left, my family, several groups of friends we holiday with each year, and all of our children were harassed, yelled at, leered at, and repeatedly threatened with having our site and holiday canceled. Our children were intimidated, sworn at, and had their skateboards deliberately stopped by outstretched feet or were nearly run over by swerving golf carts.

We chose to forgo our car parking space to use the area for our family of six instead—something we’ve done every year without any issues from management or other holidaymakers. I would have gladly adjusted our setup if I had been approached with even a modicum of decency, but instead, I was aggressively confronted late in the afternoon after we had already arrived and set up camp (anyone with kids knows how exhausting this process is), right in the middle of preparing dinner for four adults and five children.

Our holiday was ruined not only by constant patrolling, staring, and antisocial behavior from management but also by a flood of unnecessary emails to all guests about parked boats, electric scooters, “trespassing” near the café after closing, and other petty grievances. Honestly, it felt more like a school camp than a family holiday.

To anyone considering booking here, I’d suggest waiting until these two (Glen and Lorraine, for clarity) have moved on to less green pastures. If Agnes is a must, there are other accommodation options—and believe me, it’s worth avoiding this place under the current management. Not a single person I spoke to during our stay escaped some form of unpleasant encounter with them.

If NRMA reads this, I am willing to remove this review once the issue has been addressed. I will also be submitting a formal complaint.

The location and set up is great . Being on the beach was great . Unfortunately the manager has such a negative attitude that completely spoiled my entire time . His egotistical attitude had every camper on edge . I honestly can't understand he still has a job in the position he does .
As much as I like the park and location,  I will NOT return as I am here to relax and not be on edge constantly . I witnessed many interactions with other patrons the same .
Nrma you really need to look at reviewing your management as they are just not right for the job.

Took 2 days to get our gifted Voucher sorted Very noisy roadworks started at 6.15 each morning AND council mowers, blowers etc etc right behing us for hours WHY so early? Not a holiday thats for sure Packing up and leaving 2 days early Poor form to not advise guests about major works going on, and then hear the standard 'we dont offer credits/refunds"

Stayed 4 nights. We had a can site along the front, just behind the villas. We could see the ocean from our site, and the constant breeze both kept the temperature down and the mozzies away.  A cafe on site  mad pack up day do easy, as we went there for an amazing breakfast without having to do any dishes. Will definitely stay again.

Great spot. We had one night where a nearby AirBnB had Schoolies playing up until 4am. They passed out whooshes. We made as much noise as possible the next morning to help them on their life’s journeys. Amenities were fantastic as was the beach for body bashing.

I recently stayed in one of the cabins at NRMA Agnes Water Holiday Park, and unfortunately, my experience was not great. While the cabin itself was okay, it was not clean. I found an empty water bottle beside the sofa and other items left behind in the cabin. The shower also had a significant amount of mould, which was very off-putting.

On a positive note, the location of the park is fantastic, with easy access to the beach and surrounding attractions. However, the cleanliness of the cabin really overshadowed the experience.

What disappointed me the most was the lack of response from management. I sent an email about the cleanliness issues, but no one bothered to reply. This lack of communication and accountability was frustrating and sad.

I cannot recommend this place to my friends and wouldn’t stay here again unless improvements are made.

Lovely area to visit. New end of park is open and very well maintained. So very close to the beach and easy to get all supplies with the three shopping areas. Walking distance to restaurants, shops, beach
Great cabins. Staff were friendly.  Perfect location.
Awesome spot will be back soon. Needs recycling bins in cabins
Unfortunately there wasn't any accommodation available.

Another lovely NRMA holiday park. We stayed in one of the two beachfront cabins which was very nice. I had a large group booking for some other villas and safari tents and the staff were very helpful in the lead up to our arrival.
The park is well appointed with an onsite cafe for coffee and brunch lovers, a flagged beach area, and good amenities. Highly recommended.

We have been coming to this park for many many years, and have loved it  it’s unfortunate that a staff member like Lisa is rude and doesn’t understand lengths of motorhomes, we used to have a Jayco Silverline over all length 8 mtrs, we then bought a motorhome which has the same overall length to be told we cannot fit on the same sites. Everytime we call same answer oh well guess we go somewhere else

We stayed on a Springs Rd powered site that catered for campervans and motorhomes. It was a wonderful place to stay. Large well grassed sites with a concrete slab and plenty of room. The camp kitchen was great and the amenities spotlessly clean and comparatively new. The location is amazing with a short walk to the highly recommended Cafe and beautiful beach. This really is a wonderful spot to camp and we're looking forward to returning for a longer stay in future.
Tidy, clean, peaceful with easy access to the beach and shops. Loved our stay at this park.
Great location, reasonable price. Bathrooms were ok, not enough of them, showers were not great,

Grea
Great park great location awsome beaches a very wonderful stay  ⛱

Eigentlich ein wunderbarer Ort,direkt am Meer. Nur leider ist der Campingplatz völlig überfüllt, es wird auch die letzte Ecke teuer vermietet. Wir hatten zuerst einen Stellplatz zugewiesen bekommen, es gab nicht viel Platz dort, aber direkt neben uns auf 5m² wurde eine 10Köpfige Familie untergebracht mit 2 Zelten,einem Hund und vielen lärmenden Kindern. Das hätte man besser aufteilen können, denn im hinteren Bereich gab es noch Platz,dort waren keine Großfamilien,nur kleine Zelte, da kann man drauf achten bei der Platzverteilung. Die Küche ist OK, die Toiletten und Duschen sauber. Für das WC braucht man einen Schlüssel,den man ständig bei sich tragen muss-warum?das haben wir nicht verstanden. Das Café hat nur am Tag geöffnet. In dem Ort gibt es nichts,das länger als 20 Uhr auf hat. Wir sind keine Rentner,die 19Uhr schlafen gehen. Es ist ziemlich langweilig am Abend,man kann nirgends hin gehen. Der Preis ist viel zu hoch dafür. Wir empfehlen nicht diesen Platz.

Absolutely spectacular location. Right on the beach with a variety of beautiful accommodation options. Very relaxed atmosphere with plenty of leafy grass areas. Very pet friendly. Clean facilities and friendly staff. We will definitely be back.

I recently stayed here during the school holidays and I have to say as a travelling to many caravan parks the reception here are the most rude and unorganised people I have met (Leisa & male park manager)
I spoke to reception (Tracey) at 2pm day of arrival saying I was going to be late cause of caravan issue then when I got close there was a serious accident on road in I tried to call at 5:15 (reception open to 6) left a msg then again at 6:15 no call back I arrived at 7:25pm with No check-in details, No access codes, No call back thankgod the other party gave me the code and I could get in and set-up on her site, next morning I got charged the rest of the stay (3nights) I went to reception said to them, what happened about no access, no check in and charged me, no answer of there phone, they did not apologise, I said I'm set up on friends site why charge me full fee, he proceeded to say you need to pay for the 2 sites, I said but you left me stranded didn't answer phone nor leave me any check in details, he practically said bad luck, you need to pay for both, it's peak season ,I replied if peak season how come you did not answer the phone , if I didn't have friends access code I woul have been left on street,I asked for the money to be refunded for 2/3 nights if not Il being writing this review, he said go ahead.
Leisa kept buttung in & talking over me, some of the rudest people.
Caravan parks location is great 5 star
1 star for the organisation or those 2 staff members.
NRMA head office you need to have a chat with these people, I'm an Australian traveller and have stayed at 10 of your locations , never had any problems like this
A great caravan park right on the beach front

Really beautiful campsite with own beach access and the beach bar is amazing! Just a pitty that it’s not open for sunset time.
Really clean and calm campsite. I can recommend a lot the Diving shop in town :-)
Great spot but hard to get into in Winter

We recently stayed at NRMA Agnes Water Holiday Park in Agnes Waters, Queensland, and had a fantastic experience! The park's close proximity to the beach made our stay incredibly enjoyable, allowing us to easily access the beautiful shoreline for walks and relaxation.

The amenities at the park were very clean and convenient, adding to the overall comfort of our stay. It's evident that the staff take great care in maintaining the facilities, ensuring a pleasant experience for all guests.

Additionally, we loved exploring the small town of Agnes Waters. The local people were incredibly friendly, adding a warm and welcoming touch to our visit. The combination of a great holiday park and a charming town made our trip truly memorable.

We highly recommend NRMA Agnes Water Holiday Park and look forward to our next visit!

We stayed so we could be with caravanning friends, and we paid about $160/night for a studio facing the beach. Those studio rooms are pretty compact & I would choose something larger like the adjacent "villa" if there was a next time. No cooking facilities in room, but a large fridge & microwave plus crockery etc,  but being a camp ground there's a site kitchen. It has a nice deck & view. The park surprised us with it's huuuge size & variety of accommodation, but we thought the caravanners were very crowded.
Reception staff were great.

Stay in the surf mist cabin directly on the beach for location, price and what you get it’s 5 stars all the way. We had a great time. If there are people next door then be aware that the two front cabins have joining doors so if you have a noisy neighbour this might break your serenity
Pretty good except all the extra tourists and people 😁
Love this location

Schöne Lage, Beachfront. Nebenan ist ein Spielplatz. Café mit Meerblick vorhanden und gutem Angebot. Leider sind die Sanitäranlagen schmutzig, es gibt auch keinen Putzplan o.ä. wie in anderen Parks - daher max. eine Nacht hier für uns! Schade!

Has been a bit frustrating calling trying to get a vacancy for weekend away and always not available. But this weekend we finally got lucky, yes site was a bit small, but OMG we could see the water, amenities were great, beach is best we've ever swam at. If you haven't been to Agnes waters then you definitely need to, only thing I have read is how poor and far away new section is with poor amenities, thank god we were in old section as was so beautiful.

Really lovely place, except one major issue.
We had spot 21 which is directly across from what appears to be a permanent spot, and they sit outside and smoke all day, it is repugnant.
The smoke drifts and the area stinks.
Love the beach and love everything about Agnes!!
Loved every minute.

One of the most stressful camping trips I have ever had.
Arrived someone else was on our site, we had booked 3 mths ahead. Got that sorted moved to another site.
The amenities were humid and filthy, lucky to find a clean toilet.
Then our Esky was stolen with all
Our food. So we had to leave early. So paid for 6 nights and only got to stay for 3.
On informing the park staff that the esky was stolen, the response was oh no not again. I get that these things happen, but a heads up seen they knew this was a possibility would have been good.
Location was good, though did say can swim without stinger suits and there were ALOT of stingers.
This trip was for my daughter’s Bday, having to pack up and leave in 37degree heat on her birthday was sad. Massive waste of money on top of loosing all our food.
Dirty old room not clean at all even after they cleand again….
Camping sites, powered or not, RV sites, Glamping tents, cabins, villas, on-site cafe, stunning location, this place has it all! Just go ahead and book it, you won't be disappointed!
Great spot. Beach is always amazing
Location 5/5. lots of kids. Helpful staff.

This Park is one of the best run parks around. Managers and Staff are great and any problem you may have is dealt with immediately. We feel very secure in this park and any problem from unruly and drunken people is dealt with calmly and efficiently. the site is clean and mowed and the toilets and showers albeit very old are clean and has great hot water. thank you for making our stay a great one.
On second day of our 4 night stay. So far amazing. Walk to beach, shops  fooderies. Hoping to rebook for longer next year..

After booking months in advance and stipulating the size of our van, we arrived to a site that would struggle to accommodate a tent. Staff seemed to want to make it our fault for not calling ahead 🤷 Beautiful location, powered site like a prison cell....

I booked a year in advance for a 6 weeks east coast trip and requested the old section (closer to beach as we had kids and lots of boards/beach gear) but ended up being allocated one of the furthermost sites approx 300m from beach. So after the first day of lugging everything to the beach we found it was easier to drive to the public car park outside the park. Not ideal to say the least.

Also 1 x toilet in the mens room to share between quite a lot of sites. If you are at the beach you don't get a key or code for the toilets near the beach but can get a key from the cafe which was frustrating when the key or keys were already being used and our toilets were soooo far away. Very annoying with kids.

Anyway, the park location is great but I would strongly recommend the "old section" if you can. It has the true surf vibe camping feel while the new section felt like a retirement village.
Nice park with good amenities. We arranged after hours arrival with no hassles at all.... Very accommodating and would stay again.
Cramped like most CP. Lovely cafe near beach. Quite dog friendly in park.
Great location and great caravan park.
We absolutely loved our stay at NRMA Agnes Waters and wished we could have stayed longer. The park has its own beach access and a Cafe. The amenities are very clean and modern.

We are on our first solo trek in the van, & spent 10 nights at this location, which coincidentally is the time of 1770 festival.

We are enjoying the overall experience in this site, & have the feedback as follows:

Positives:
This site is really well setup beside the beach, staff are friendly, and facilities suitable to both abled & disabled campers.
We are loving the sense of community amongst campers, feel included as LGBTIQ+ folk, and living our days (pretty much) as if on a QCB event.

Challenges:
Be aware that this park has 2 areas:

- The older (beachfront) area puts you real close to beach, and mixes campsites with luxury Glamping facilities. The latter have the best views, being situated with beach views, with regular campsites a step behind.

- The newer site, while attached, is a short walk to the beach, and is a denser mix of caravan & RV sites. We are situated in this area, being a last minute booking on a busy weekend.

General considerations:
Agnes Waters has really bad phone service, unless with telstra, and the site wifi was down in our area (tech problem). If you want to be connected, consider this before hitting this town.

I purchased a telstra modem to deal with this, and may keep this service for future camps.

- Craig
